name: Bowl of the Wife of Kit Carson
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Cooked chicken or turkey meat
1/4 cup Monterey jack or Muenster cheese
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Dudley Cable-Larche of The Fort, near Denver, CO
Preparation Time: 0:10
Heat broth to boiling and add chicken (or turkey), garbanzos, chipotle pepper, rice and oregano. Serve in large individual bowls, and add cheese pieces and avocado just prior to serving.
